description: The second table in packages/pi-beadwork-extension/docs/commands.md still uses unescaped | characters for OR examples, breaking Markdown table rendering. Update the table formatting and validate docs formatting/rendering assumptions.

comments.text: Fixed the malformed second table in `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/docs/commands.md` by normalizing the table rows and escaping the inline `|` alternatives (`\|`) inside command examples. Validated with `npm run lint -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`, `npm run test -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`, and `npm run typecheck -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`. Commit: `c97f490` (`docs(pi-beadwork): fix commands table escaping`).

title: Fix malformed table pipes in pi-beadwork commands docs
